title: UI: message view panel
description:
## Why
The user needs to read the messages in the selected chat.

## What
- Display messages in receivedAt order, oldest at top
- Each row: sender display name (fall back to login, then id), timestamp (coarsened to hour granularity), body text
- Show [edited] tag when editedAt is set
- Show [deleted] when deletedAt is set (body will be empty)
- Show [encrypted] when bodyType is not text/plain or text/markdown
- Auto-scroll to bottom on new message; preserve scroll position on history load
- PgUp/PgDn and scroll wheel to navigate history
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
